name: codex-blocking-exec
description: A Codex hook plugin that runs Bash commands inside PreToolUse and returns one final result.

interface.shortDescription: Block inside a hook for Bash commands.
interface.longDescription: Codex Blocking Exec ships a PreToolUse hook that intercepts Bash commands, runs the original command synchronously inside the hook, captures a log, and rewrites the Bash tool call to report the final exit code and output tail.
defaultPrompt: Run this long command through the blocking hook.
